method_atom: A consistent, computationally tractable estimator for the likelihood of a probabilistic generative model whose exact likelihood (normalizing constant) is intractable, enabling quantitative, likelihood-based scoring and comparison of competing models against data instead of relying on qualitative inspection of generated samples.
object_atom: Deep belief networks used as statistical generative models of natural image patches (natural sensory stimuli) in machine learning and computational neuroscience.
brief_reason: The tractable likelihood-estimation-for-model-comparison machinery carries across fields, while the deep-belief-network model of natural image patches is the domain-specific object.
